title: URawToB64
text: URawToB64 Encode raw data in Base64 format extern long URawToB64(const unsigned char * In , long Inlen , unsigned char * Out , long OutMaxLen ); Parameters Parameter Direction Description In IN Data that is to be encoded InLen IN Length of the data that is to be encoded Out OUT Base64 encoded result OutMaxLen IN Maximum number of bytes that can be written to Out Return Values Value Meaning < 0 Not all characters have been encoded. ( -1 x ReturnValue ) have been encoded. 0 Failed to encode in base64 > 0 All characters have been encoded. The value is the actual length of the output data. Use Library uenc Description This function is useful for creating security drivers that need to encode and decode data. Related Links UB64ToRaw Decode a null terminated Base64 encoded string to raw data. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
